parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title User Log in

participant client
participant "/auth" as auth
participant AuthDatabase
participant "/user" as user

client -> auth : POST\nusername/password
auth -> AuthDatabase : authToken
auth --> client : RESPONSE\nauthToken
client -> user : GET\nauthToken/userId
user --> client : RESPONSE\nuser profile data

@enduml
```
